title: The Rainbow
content:
I saw the lovely arch
    Of Rainbow span the sky,
 The gold sun burning
    As the rain swept by.

 In bright-ringed solitude
    The showery foliage shone
 One lovely moment,
    And the Bow was gone.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter De La Mare, titled "The Rainbow", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
